1.anchor: Now concerning how and when all this will happen, dear brothers and sisters,

4.anchor: But you aren’t in the dark about these things, dear brothers and sisters, and you won’t be surprised when the day of the Lord comes like a thief.
4.note: Some manuscripts read comes upon you as if you were thieves.

1.anchor: You yourselves know, dear brothers and sisters,

7.anchor: As apostles of Christ we certainly had a right to make some demands of you, but instead we were like children
7.note: Some manuscripts read we were gentle.

1.anchor: This letter is from Paul, Silas,

4.anchor: We know, dear brothers and sisters,

5.anchor: For when we brought you the Good News, it was not only with words but also with power, for the Holy Spirit gave you full assurance
5.note: Or with the power of the Holy Spirit, so you can have full assurance.

7.anchor: As a result, you have become an example to all the believers in Greece—throughout both Macedonia and Achaia.

2.anchor: and we sent Timothy to visit you. He is our brother and God’s co-worker
2.note: Other manuscripts read and God’s servant; and a co-worker, and a servant and co-worker for God, and God’s servant and our co-worker.

7.anchor: So we have been greatly encouraged in the midst of our troubles and suffering, dear brothers and sisters,

4.anchor: Then each of you will control his own body
4.note: Or will know how to take a wife for himself; will learn to live with his own wife; will know how to possess his own vessel.

6.anchor: Never harm or cheat a fellow believer in this matter by violating his wife,
6.note: Greek Never harm or cheat a brother in this matter.

9.anchor: But we don’t need to write to you about the importance of loving each other,

10.anchor: Indeed, you already show your love for all the believers

13.anchor: And now, dear brothers and sisters, we want you to know what will happen to the believers who have died
13.note: Greek those who have fallen asleep;

15.anchor: We tell you this directly from the Lord: We who are still living when the Lord returns will not meet him ahead of those who have died.
15.note: Greek those who have fallen asleep.

16.anchor: For the Lord himself will come down from heaven with a commanding shout, with the voice of the archangel, and with the trumpet call of God. First, the believers who have died
